sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45908" key="e)xetognw/mones" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐχετογνώμονες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n45908.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sluices</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">penstocks to hold up the water at a certain height</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0116.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Abyd.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
